name: select
title: Select
description: Keyboard-friendly select menu with animated open/close transitions.
docs:
# Select
Keyboard-friendly select menu with animated open/close transitions.
## Import
```tsx
import { Select, SelectGroup, SelectValue, SelectTrigger, SelectScrollUpButton, SelectScrollDownButton, SelectContent, SelectLabel, SelectItem, SelectSeparator } from "@/components/ui/select";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Select value="design" length={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **value** (string) — default: `"design"`: Value
- **length** (number): Length
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add select
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/select
```
